page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: ataqv is a toolkit for measuring and comparing ATAC-seq results. It was written to help understand how well ATAC-seq assays have worked, and to make it easier to spot differences that might be caused by library prep or sequencing.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A toolkit for measuring and comparing ATAC-seq results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A toolkit for measuring and comparing ATAC-seq results.
